metadata.base_negative: ugly, deformed, noisy, blurry, low contrast, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, signature, multiple faces, asymmetric, human photo, realistic skin

style_descriptions.style_1: Ethereal fantasy art, soft glowing aura, mystical atmosphere
style_descriptions.style_2: Bold anime style, vibrant colors, dynamic energy
style_descriptions.style_3: Minimalist geometric, clean lines, symbolic representation
style_descriptions.style_4: Painterly watercolor, flowing brushstrokes, dreamy aesthetic
style_descriptions.style_5: Digital art nouveau, ornate patterns, elegant composition
